title: Weather and Weekends
description: Quick chat with a coworker in the elevator about the weather and weekend plans.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Morning! Did you see the rain this morning? It came out of nowhere.

templates.text: Yeah, I got soaked walking from the station.
templates.hint_zh: 對啊,我從車站走過來整個淋濕了。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Oh no. Forecast says it'll keep raining until Wednesday.

templates.text: That's a bummer. I was hoping to go hiking this weekend.
templates.hint_zh: 真掃興,我這週末本來想去爬山的。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Maybe try indoor stuff instead? There's a new coffee shop on Pine Street.

templates.text: Oh nice, what's it like? Quiet enough to work?
templates.hint_zh: 喔不錯,環境怎樣?夠安靜可以工作嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Surprisingly yes, especially on weekend mornings. Their flat white is excellent.

templates.text: I'll have to check it out. Thanks for the tip!
templates.hint_zh: 那我有空一定去,感謝推薦!

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Anytime. Hope the weather clears up for your hike eventually.

templates.text: Me too. Have a good one, see you in the meeting later.
templates.hint_zh: 希望如此。祝你今天順利,等等開會見。
